tamarin.stdout:
theory XamanPayloadProtocol

begin

// Function signature and definition of the equational theory E

functions: backend_patch/3, deep_link_ref/2, event_ref/2, fst/1, h/1,
           pair/2, payload_ref/2, pk/1, push_ref/2, qr_ref/2, request_json/4,
           sign/2, signed_payload/4, snd/1, true/0, verify/3
equations:
    fst(<x.1, x.2>) = x.1,
    snd(<x.1, x.2>) = x.2,
    verify(sign(x.1, x.2), x.1, pk(x.2)) = true

rule (modulo E) CreatePayloadSession:
   [ Fr( ~Sid ), Fr( ~Uuid ) ]
  --[
  PayloadSessionCreated( ~Sid, ~Uuid, 'requester_app', 'xaman_user',
                         'xrpl_mainnet'
  ),
  PayloadIssued( ~Sid, ~Uuid, 'requester_app', 'xaman_user', 'xrpl_mainnet'
  ),
  RequesterBound( ~Sid, ~Uuid, 'requester_app' )
  ]->
   [
   !PayloadSession( ~Sid, ~Uuid, 'requester_app', 'xaman_user',
                    'xrpl_mainnet'
   ),
   Out( payload_ref(~Uuid, 'requester_app') )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) RegisterSoftwareSignerSecret:
   [ Fr( ~Sk ) ]
  --[ VaultSecretStored( 'xaman_user', ~Sk ) ]->
   [ !VaultSecret( 'xaman_user', ~Sk ), Out( pk(~Sk) ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) TrustedBackendRegistersPayload:
   [ !PayloadSession( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) ]
  --[
  BackendTrustBoundary( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'payload_registered' ),
  PayloadReceived( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
  RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester )
  ]->
   [
   !BackendPayloadAuthorized( Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network,
                              h(request_json(Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network))
   ),
   Out( qr_ref(Uuid, Requester) ), Out( deep_link_ref(Uuid, Requester) ),
   Out( push_ref(Uuid, Requester) ), Out( event_ref(Uuid, Requester) )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) QRReferenceIntake:
   [
   !PayloadSession( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
   In( qr_ref(Uuid, Requester) )
   ]
  --[
  IntakeAccepted( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'QR' ),
  RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester )
  ]->
   [ IntakeState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, 'QR' ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) DeepLinkReferenceIntake:
   [
   !PayloadSession( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
   In( deep_link_ref(Uuid, Requester) )
   ]
  --[
  IntakeAccepted( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'DEEP_LINK' ),
  RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester )
  ]->
   [ IntakeState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, 'DEEP_LINK' ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) PushReferenceIntake:
   [
   !PayloadSession( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
   In( push_ref(Uuid, Requester) )
   ]
  --[
  IntakeAccepted( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'PUSH_NOTIFICATION' ),
  RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester )
  ]->
   [
   IntakeState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, 'PUSH_NOTIFICATION' )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) EventListReferenceIntake:
   [
   !PayloadSession( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
   In( event_ref(Uuid, Requester) )
   ]
  --[
  IntakeAccepted( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'EVENT_LIST' ),
  RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester )
  ]->
   [ IntakeState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, 'EVENT_LIST' ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload:
   [
   IntakeState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ),
   !BackendPayloadAuthorized( Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Digest )
   ]
  --[
  BackendTrustBoundary( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'authorized_fetch' ),
  DigestVerified( Sid, Uuid, Digest ), DigestChecked( Sid, Uuid, Digest ),
  RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester )
  ]->
   [
   VerifiedPayload( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) DisplayReview:
   [
   VerifiedPayload( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest )
   ]
  --[
  ReviewDisplayed( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ),
  UserReviewed( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ),
  DigestVerified( Sid, Uuid, Digest ),
  RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester )
  ]->
   [ ReviewState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) ApprovePayload:
   [ ReviewState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest ) ]
  --[
  UserApproved( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
  ApprovalRecorded( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer )
  ]->
   [ ApprovedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) RevalidateBeforeSigning:
   [
   ApprovedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest ),
   !BackendPayloadAuthorized( Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Digest )
   ]
  --[
  PayloadRevalidated( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
  DigestVerified( Sid, Uuid, Digest ),
  BackendTrustBoundary( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'pre_sign_revalidation' )
  ]->
   [
   RevalidatedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) OpenVaultAfterAuthentication:
   [
   RevalidatedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest
   ),
   !VaultSecret( Signer, Sk )
   ]
  --[
  AuthenticatedVaultOpen( Sid, Uuid, Signer ),
  AuthPassed( Sid, Uuid, Signer ), VaultOpened( Sid, Uuid, Signer ),
  PayloadRevalidated( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network )
  ]->
   [
   AuthenticatedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin,
                       Digest, Sk
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) SignRevalidatedPayload:
   [
   AuthenticatedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin,
                       Digest, Sk
   )
   ]
  --[
  PayloadSigned( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
  AuthenticatedVaultOpen( Sid, Uuid, Signer ),
  PayloadRevalidated( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network )
  ]->
   [
   SignedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network,
                signed_payload(Uuid, Digest, pk(Sk),
                               sign(request_json(Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network), Sk))
   ),
   !ConsumedPayload( Uuid )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) PatchSignedPayloadToBackend:
   [
   SignedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, SignedPayload ),
   !BackendPayloadAuthorized( Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Digest )
   ]
  --[
  SignedPayloadPatched( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
  BackendTrustBoundary( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'signed_patch' )
  ]->
   [
   PatchedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network,
                 backend_patch(Uuid, Requester, SignedPayload)
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) SubmitPatchedPayloadToLedger:
   [ PatchedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Patch ) ]
  --[
  LedgerBroadcastRequested( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
  PayloadBroadcast( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
  SignedPayloadPatched( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network )
  ]->
   [ SubmittedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Patch ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) BlockReplayOfConsumedPayload:
   [
   !PayloadSession( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ),
   !ConsumedPayload( Uuid ), In( payload_ref(Uuid, Requester) )
   ]
  --[
  ReplayBlocked( Sid, Uuid, Requester ),
  NonceConsumed( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer )
  ]->
   [ ReplayBlockedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) RejectPayload:
   [ ReviewState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin, Digest ) ]
  --[
  PayloadRejected( Sid, Uuid, Requester ),
  BackendTrustBoundary( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'reject_patch' )
  ]->
   [ RejectedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) ExpirePayload:
   [ IntakeState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ) ]
  --[ PayloadExpired( Sid, Uuid, Requester ) ]->
   [ ExpiredState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

lemma review_requires_verified_payload:
  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network Origin #i.
    (ReviewDisplayed( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ Digest #j. (DigestVerified( Sid, Uuid, Digest ) @ #j) ∧ (#j < #i))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network Origin #i.
  (ReviewDisplayed( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ Digest #j. (DigestVerified( Sid, Uuid, Digest ) @ #j) ⇒ ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( VerifiedPayload( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin,
                        Digest
       ) ▶₀ #i )
  case FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload_case_1
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload_case_2
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload_case_3
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload_case_4
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma requester_binding_precedes_review:
  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network Origin #i.
    (ReviewDisplayed( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j. (RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester ) @ #j) ∧ (#j < #i))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network Origin #i.
  (ReviewDisplayed( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ #j. (RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester ) @ #j) ⇒ ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( VerifiedPayload( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin,
                        Digest
       ) ▶₀ #i )
  case FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload_case_1
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload_case_2
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload_case_3
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case FetchAndVerifyRemotePayload_case_4
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma qr_and_deep_link_intake_preserve_requester:
  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Origin #i.
    ((IntakeAccepted( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Origin ) @ #i) ∧
     ((Origin = 'QR') ∨ (Origin = 'DEEP_LINK'))) ⇒
    (∃ #j.
      (RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester ) @ #j) ∧ ((#j < #i) ∨ (#j = #i)))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ Sid Uuid Requester Origin #i.
  (IntakeAccepted( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Origin ) @ #i)
 ∧
  (((Origin = 'QR') ∨ (Origin = 'DEEP_LINK'))) ∧
  (∀ #j.
    (RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester ) @ #j)
   ⇒
    (¬(#j < #i)) ∧ (¬(#j = #i)))"
*/
simplify
solve( (Origin = 'QR')  ∥ (Origin = 'DEEP_LINK') )
  case case_1
  solve( IntakeAccepted( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'QR' ) @ #i )
    case QRReferenceIntake
    by contradiction /* from formulas */
  qed
next
  case case_2
  solve( IntakeAccepted( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'DEEP_LINK' ) @ #i )
    case DeepLinkReferenceIntake
    by contradiction /* from formulas */
  qed
qed

lemma signing_requires_auth_revalidation_and_network:
  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network #i.
    (PayloadSigned( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j #k.
      ((((AuthenticatedVaultOpen( Sid, Uuid, Signer ) @ #j) ∧
         (PayloadRevalidated( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #k)) ∧
        (#j < #i)) ∧
       (#k < #i)) ∧
      (Network = 'xrpl_mainnet'))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network #i.
  (PayloadSigned( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ #j #k.
   (AuthenticatedVaultOpen( Sid, Uuid, Signer ) @ #j) ∧
   (PayloadRevalidated( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #k) ∧
   (Network = 'xrpl_mainnet')
  ⇒
   ((¬(#j < #i)) ∨ (¬(#k < #i)))"
*/
simplify
solve( AuthenticatedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin,
                           Digest, Sk
       ) ▶₀ #i )
  case OpenVaultAfterAuthentication_case_1
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case OpenVaultAfterAuthentication_case_2
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case OpenVaultAfterAuthentication_case_3
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case OpenVaultAfterAuthentication_case_4
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma modeled_vault_secret_not_revealed:
  all-traces
  "∀ Signer Sk #i.
    (VaultSecretStored( Signer, Sk ) @ #i) ⇒ (¬(∃ #j. K( Sk ) @ #j))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ Signer Sk #i.
  (VaultSecretStored( Signer, Sk ) @ #i) ∧ ∃ #j. (K( Sk ) @ #j)"
*/
simplify
by solve( !KU( ~Sk ) @ #vk )

lemma signed_patch_requires_backend_trust:
  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network #i.
    (SignedPayloadPatched( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j.
      (BackendTrustBoundary( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'signed_patch' ) @ #j) ∧
      ((#j < #i) ∨ (#j = #i)))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network #i.
  (SignedPayloadPatched( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ #j.
   (BackendTrustBoundary( Sid, Uuid, Requester, 'signed_patch' ) @ #j)
  ⇒
   (¬(#j < #i)) ∧ (¬(#j = #i))"
*/
simplify
solve( SignedPayloadPatched( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network
       ) @ #i )
  case PatchSignedPayloadToBackend
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
next
  case SubmitPatchedPayloadToLedger
  solve( PatchedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Patch
         ) ▶₀ #i )
    case PatchSignedPayloadToBackend_case_1
    by contradiction /* from formulas */
  next
    case PatchSignedPayloadToBackend_case_2
    by contradiction /* from formulas */
  next
    case PatchSignedPayloadToBackend_case_3
    by contradiction /* from formulas */
  next
    case PatchSignedPayloadToBackend_case_4
    by contradiction /* from formulas */
  qed
qed

lemma broadcast_requires_signed_patch:
  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network #i.
    (LedgerBroadcastRequested( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network
     ) @ #i) ⇒

 ∧

  ⇒

*/
simplify
by contradiction /* from formulas */

lemma local_replay_after_signing_is_blocked:
  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network #i #j.
    ((PayloadSigned( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #i) ∧
     (ReplayBlocked( Sid, Uuid, Requester ) @ #j)) ⇒
    (#i < #j)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network #i #j.
  (PayloadSigned( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #i) ∧
  (ReplayBlocked( Sid, Uuid, Requester ) @ #j)
 ∧
  ¬(#i < #j)"
*/
simplify
solve( AuthenticatedState( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin,
                           Digest, Sk
       ) ▶₀ #i )
  case OpenVaultAfterAuthentication_case_1
  solve( !PayloadSession( ~Sid, ~Uuid, 'requester_app', Signer, Network
         ) ▶₀ #j )
    case CreatePayloadSession
    solve( !ConsumedPayload( ~Uuid ) ▶₁ #j )
      case SignRevalidatedPayload_case_1
      solve( !KU( payload_ref(~Uuid, 'requester_app') ) @ #vk )
        case CreatePayloadSession
        solve( !KU( qr_ref(~Uuid, 'requester_app') ) @ #vk.1 )
          case TrustedBackendRegistersPayload
          SOLVED // trace found
        qed
      qed
    qed
  qed
qed

  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network Origin #i.
    (ReviewDisplayed( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network, Origin ) @ #i) ⇒

*/

lemma sign_requires_user_approval:
  all-traces
  "∀ Sid Uuid Requester Signer Network #i.
    (PayloadSigned( Sid, Uuid, Requester, Signer, Network ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j.
      (RequesterBound( Sid, Uuid, Requester ) @ #j) ∧ ((#j < #i) ∨ (#j = #i)))"
